notes: Initial release: a fast, single-binary web UI for Kubernetes that proxies every request with your own credentials, so the cluster's RBAC always decides what you see.
Live, watch-driven resource views from Pods through RBAC over one multiplexed WebSocket connection - no polling, deltas only.
Multi-cluster switching, a cluster Overview, an interactive topology graph, a live events timeline, and a global log viewer.
Actions where you need them: in-browser exec, node cordon and drain, rollout restart, scale, YAML editing with validation and diff, and port-forwarding.
First-class Helm: releases, history, values and manifests, rollback, uninstall, install, and upgrade.
CPU and memory usage from metrics.k8s.io, joined to requests and allocatable in tables and detail views.
Identity modes for every deployment shape: local kubeconfig, shared ServiceAccount, and per-user OIDC sign-in.
Built-in update notifications with one-click self-update where the binary is writable.
